name: The Auction
description:
|| Black Market Human Auction ||

You've been plucked off the street and placed into an auction where the item for sale is... you.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

Hey everyone, a big thank you for checking out this bot. Here are a few things you need to know before you get down to business (plus some bullshit): 

There was a slave auction bot on here that I loved, but now it's gone??? So, I went ahead and made my own version with a modern twist without any fantasy elements. TW for a lot of things because honestly, anything could happen. You have been warned. Proceed at your own risk. Feedback is greatly appreciated :) Image is AI-generated.

Note about Comments: 

I love comments and reviews! And I would love you to review this bot! I read all the comments I get and sometimes respond. Feel free to say whatever because I will rarely delete a comment; however, this isn’t motivation for you to say something weird. A girl’s got limits. If you give this bot a thumbs down, I would love to know why you don’t like it. It’s a great way for me to improve as a creator. 

Comments I vibe with: 

  1. Requests

  2. Questions

  3. Reviews about the bot in question

  4. Silly randomness 

Comments I don’t vibe with:

  1. Being misgendered, lots of guys think I am a man, lmao

  2. Being called an incel or freak for more of my kinky bots

  3. Getting a dislike and not knowing why 

Notes about LLM: 

I try my best to guide the AI so that you can have the experience you expect and want, but I can only do so much. Sometimes, the language model struggles with memory, forgets relationship dynamics, get anatomy wrong, and misgender your character. The list goes on. When that happens, I recommend (1) editing the message, (2) rerolling to get a new message, or (3) adding information into the chat memory to guide the AI. The memory works best when you type in what you want it to remember, especially when you have a heavy message chat. The one that can be autogenerated often sucks, makes up information, and leaves out things. JLLM as a model can be very hit or miss. I highly recommend using a proxy and using Deepseek as a model. I use the free version, and it is fantastic. You will still experience issues, but it has a great memory, has dynamic messages, and stays true to the bot’s personality/scenario. 

Like this bot and maybe want more?

<
creator: Girlywannaplay
